items.title: How we use cookies
items.body_html: We use essential cookies to keep the site working and optional analytics cookies to understand how it is used. You can change your choice at any time from the footer.

items.title: Who we share data with
items.body_html:
We share limited data with the processors that host and secure the service. We never sell your personal information.

  • Hosting and infrastructure
  • Payment processing
  • Product analytics

items.title: Your rights
items.body_html: You can request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data. Contact our privacy team and we will respond within 30 days.
